chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1175 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4879/2023 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 Mr. Qadeer Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Deferred. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Counsel for the petitioner does not press the present Constitution Petition as the petitioner intends to approach the “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” established pursuant to the notification issued by the Member, Board of Revenue, Sindh. Since the Senior Member, Board of Revenue, Sindh, through Notification No. DD(E\&I)-HQ/BOR/2024/302 dated 21.10.2024, has established a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner, the said Cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates, foti-khata-badal, demarcation of land, land partition, and solvency certificates. The establishment of this Cell provides an alternate, effective, and exhaustive remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issues. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed, along with pending application. However, the petitioner is at liberty to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” as prescribed under the said Notification. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
